name: @salary-hijacking/utils
description: Salary Hijacking platform shared utility package for date, money, pagination, and string processing across payroll, budget, expense, savings, notification, growth, community, ads, admin, API, worker, and E2E surfaces.
author: Salary Hijacking Platform

scripts.prepare:utils: corepack pnpm run prepare:barrels && corepack pnpm run prepare:tsconfig
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run prepare:utils && tsc -p tsconfig.utils.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && corepack pnpm run prepare:utils && tsc -p tsconfig.utils.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required='dist/index.js dist/index.d.ts dist/date.js dist/date.d.ts dist/money.js dist/money.d.ts dist/pagination.js dist/pagination.d.ts dist/strings.js dist/strings.d.ts'.split(' '); const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[utils] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[utils] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.check:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['.','./date','./money','./pagination','./strings','./package.json']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing exports: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } for (const [key,value] of Object.entries(pkg.exports)) { if (key==='./package.json') continue; for (const field of ['types','import','default']) { if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || !(field in value)) { console.error('Invalid export '+key+' missing '+field); process.exit(1); } } }"
scripts.check:source: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const files=['src/date.ts','src/money.ts','src/pagination.ts','src/strings.ts']; const missing=files.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing utils source files: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } for (const file of files) { const text=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); if (/^\s*export\s*\{\s*\}\s*;?\s*$/m.test(text)) { console.error(file+' still contains placeholder export.'); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.check:policy: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const files=['src/date.ts','src/money.ts','src/pagination.ts','src/strings.ts']; const bannedRegex=[/from\s+[\"']react[\"']/,/from\s+[\"']react\/jsx-runtime[\"']/,/declare\s+global/,/namespace\s+JSX/,/dangerouslySetInnerHTML\s*:/,/process\.env\.[A-Z0-9_]+\s*=/]; for (const file of files) { const text=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); const hits=bannedRegex.filter((re)=>re.test(text)).map(String); if (hits.length) { console.error(file+' contains banned runtime/policy terms: '+hits.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.check:completeness: corepack pnpm run prepare:utils && tsx -e "import { getDateUtilsCompletenessReport, getMoneyUtilsCompletenessReport, getPaginationCompletenessReport, getStringsCompletenessReport, assertDateUtilsCompleteness, assertMoneyUtilsCompleteness, assertPaginationCompleteness, assertStringsCompleteness } from './src/index.ts'; assertDateUtilsCompleteness(); assertMoneyUtilsCompleteness(); assertPaginationCompleteness(); assertStringsCompleteness(); const reports=[getDateUtilsCompletenessReport(),getMoneyUtilsCompletenessReport(),getPaginationCompletenessReport(),getStringsCompletenessReport()]; const failed=reports.filter((r)=>r.ok!==true || (Array.isArray(r.missing) && r.missing.length>0)); if (failed.length) { console.error(JSON.stringify(failed,null,2)); process.exit(1); } console.log('Utils completeness OK: '+reports.length+' reports');"
scripts.check:smoke: corepack pnpm run prepare:utils && tsx -e "import { calculateDailyBudget, calculatePayrollHijack, formatWon, getPaydayForYearMonth, createPayrollCycle, createPaydayReminderAt, paginateArrayOffset, createCursorPagination, createCursorPageResult, sanitizeCommunityTitle, redactSensitiveText, extractHashtags } from './src/index.ts'; const daily=calculateDailyBudget({dailyLimitAmount:10000,activeVariableExpenseAmounts:[4000,8000]}); if (daily.remainingAmount!==0 || daily.overAmount!==2000 || daily.status!=='OVER') throw new Error('money daily budget smoke failed'); const hijack=calculatePayrollHijack({expectedSalaryAmount:3000000,fixedExpenseTotal:900000,savingsTotal:500000,dailyBudgetTotal:600000,variableExpenseTotal:120000,targetHijackAmount:800000}); if (hijack.expectedHijackAmount!==1000000 || !formatWon(hijack.expectedHijackAmount).includes('1,000,000')) throw new Error('money hijack smoke failed'); const payday=getPaydayForYearMonth('2026-02',{type:'DAY_OF_MONTH',dayOfMonth:31}); if (payday!=='2026-02-28') throw new Error('date payday smoke failed'); const cycle=createPayrollCycle('2026-03',{type:'DAY_OF_MONTH',dayOfMonth:25}); if (cycle.daysInCycle<28 || !createPaydayReminderAt(cycle.payday).startsWith('2026-03-')) throw new Error('date cycle smoke failed'); const page=paginateArrayOffset([1,2,3,4,5],{page:2,pageSize:2}); if (page.items.length!==2 || page.page!==2) throw new Error('pagination offset smoke failed'); const state=createCursorPagination({domain:'community',pageSize:2}); const cursorPage=createCursorPageResult({state,rows:[{id:'a',publishedAt:'2026-01-01'},{id:'b',publishedAt:'2026-01-02'},{id:'c',publishedAt:'2026-01-03'}],getId:(x)=>x.id,getSortValue:(x)=>x.publishedAt}); if (!cursorPage.nextCursor) throw new Error('pagination cursor smoke failed'); if (sanitizeCommunityTitle('<script>x</script> 급여 인증').includes('<')) throw new Error('strings sanitize smoke failed'); if (!redactSensitiveText('test@salary.test').redacted) throw new Error('strings redaction smoke failed'); if (extractHashtags('오늘 #급여납치 #LVUP').tags.length!==2) throw new Error('strings hashtag smoke failed'); console.log('Utils smoke OK');"
scripts.check:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['name','version','type','exports','files','scripts','devDependencies']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg)); if (missing.length) { console.error('package.json missing '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } if (pkg.name !== '@salary-hijacking/utils') { console.error('Unexpected package name: '+pkg.name); process.exit(1); } if (pkg.sideEffects !== false) { console.error('sideEffects must be false'); process.exit(1); } const text=fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8').toLowerCase(); const bad=['example'+'.com','your'+'-org','to'+'do','fix'+'me']; const hit=bad.filter((term)=>text.includes(term)); if (hit.length) { console.error('package.json contains invalid metadata: '+hit.join(', ')); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run check:package && corepack pnpm run check:exports && corepack pnpm run check:source && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run check:policy && corepack pnpm run check:completeness && corepack pnpm run check:smoke && corepack pnpm run build
